heroSubtitle: The first interactive K-5 Western Armenian learning platform for families and schools
freeForever: Free forever for Kindergarten. No credit card needed.
howItWorksTitle: Learning Armenian has never been easier
howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to get started.
step1Desc: Create a free account and your child starts learning immediately.
step2Desc: Interactive lessons with audio, matching games, and instant feedback.
step3Desc: Track progress, earn badges, and climb Mount Ararat together.
feature1Desc: Every letter and word comes with native Armenian pronunciation. Kids learn to speak, not just read.
feature2Desc: Earn the Pomegranate badge, climb Mount Ararat, and collect achievements rooted in Armenian culture.
feature3Desc: HyeLearn doesn't just teach on screens — it inspires kids to pick up a pencil and practice. Digital lessons build the foundation, real writing makes it stick.
curriculumSubtitle: Structured learning from the Armenian alphabet to reading comprehension and cultural awareness.
kindergartenDesc: Armenian alphabet, basic vocabulary, simple expressions
grade1Desc: Reading skills, expanded vocabulary, simple sentences
grade2Desc: Reading comprehension, grammar basics, cultural awareness
grade3Desc: Intermediate vocabulary, verb conjugation, Armenian history
grade4Desc: Advanced reading, complex grammar, Armenian literature
grade5Desc: Fluency building, essay writing, cultural projects
schoolsSubtitle: Give your teachers the tools to teach Armenian effectively.
schoolFeature1Desc: Monitor student progress, manage classes, customize content.
schoolFeature2Desc: Join codes, student rosters, automatic grade-level assignment.
schoolFeature3Desc: Starting at $3/student/year. Contact us for a school package.
whyDesc: Armenian families in the diaspora face a common challenge — keeping their children connected to their heritage language. Between school, homework, and activities, there's never enough time for Armenian. HyeLearn was built to solve this. A structured, interactive Western Armenian curriculum that works in just 5 minutes a day. Designed with Armenian language educators, every lesson builds on the last — from the alphabet through reading comprehension. No textbooks, no scheduling conflicts. Just open it up, learn together, and watch your child's Armenian grow.
diff1Desc: Not Eastern Armenian, not a translation. Purpose-built curriculum using classical orthography — the standard taught in diaspora schools.
diff2Desc: Earn badges named after Armenian landmarks. Climb Mount Ararat as you level up. Learn through culturally meaningful content.
diff3Desc: 5 minutes a day is all it takes. Works on any device — phone, tablet, or laptop. No scheduling, no driving to lessons.
pricingSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
faq1A: Yes. All content uses Western Armenian with classical orthography — the same standard taught in Armenian day schools across the diaspora.
faq2A: Kindergarten through Grade 5. We're adding more levels regularly.
faq3Q: Do I need to speak Armenian to help my child?
faq3A: No! The platform guides your child through each lesson. English hints are available when needed.
faq4A: Absolutely. No ads, no social features, no external links. Your child only sees learning content. COPPA compliant.
faq5A: Our curriculum is designed for Western Armenian learners and structured to build progressively from the alphabet through reading comprehension. Content is reviewed by Armenian language educators for accuracy.
faq6A: Yes! We offer school plans with teacher dashboards and class management. Contact us at schools@hyelearn.com.
faq7Q: How long does each lesson take?
faq7A: About 5 minutes. Short enough to fit into any daily routine, long enough to make real progress.
faq8Q: How do I keep my child focused on HyeLearn?
faq8A: Use your device's built-in focus mode! On iPad or iPhone, turn on Guided Access (Settings → Accessibility → Guided Access). Once enabled, triple-click the side button while HyeLearn is open — your child won't be able to leave the app until you unlock it. On Android, use Screen Pinning (Settings → Security). These features are designed exactly for this and work better than anything we could build into a website.
ctaTitle: Your child's Armenian journey starts today
ctaSubtitle: Join families across the diaspora who are keeping the language alive.
